programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes off to the Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta, where the flavors are just as sky-high as the balloons.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries new coastal classics at the LA County Fair in Pomona, like the caviar cream cake; Noah sinks his teeth into the bloody Mary burger at the Macon County Fair in Illinois and fried maple cookies 'n cream at the Vermont Maple Festival.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Cajun and Creole classics from hot jazz snacks and bayou-fresh catfish to the famous Sno-Blizz.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A Route 66 road trip from Chicago to Southern California; authentic St. Louis barbecue ribs in Missouri; the iconic Oklahoma Onion Burger; custom-built milk shakes in Albuquerque, N.M.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Houston Rodeo for their Cajun smoked tater; Noah visits the Clark County Fair in Nevada for some home cooking on a bun and goes back in time at the Medieval Fair of Norman, Okla., for the coronation of the crown cannoli.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe feels the brotherly love at the RiverRink Festival in Philadelphia with the ultimate crab fries; he checks out the South Florida Fair for the pizza supreme blossom and Las Vegas' Great American Foodie Fest for divine lobster 'n waffles.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes off to the Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta, where the flavors are just as sky-high as the balloons.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries new coastal classics at the LA County Fair in Pomona, like the caviar cream cake; Noah sinks his teeth into the bloody Mary burger at the Macon County Fair in Illinois and fried maple cookies 'n cream at the Vermont Maple Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's tummy wins big at the Clark County Fair and Rodeo in Nevada with the chili cheesecake and the penne alla cone; he keeps cozy with a hot cocoa pretzel at Winter Fest OC and visits Tallahassee, Fla., for a shortcake stuffed candy apple.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the dill donut sundae at the South Florida Fair in West Palm Beach, a BBQ lumpia sandwich at the Washington County Fair in Utah and the cereal-infused Saturday Morning Pizza at the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Vermont Maple Festival to dine on maple-infused carnival offerings; he celebrates the Mardi Gras Po'boy at the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the stacked spam burger at the Riverside County Fair in Indio, Calif.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Washington County Fair in Utah for the Twisted Pickle Roll -- a deep-fried pickle sushi dream come true -- and has a little dessert in the desert with the Cookie Dough Dog. Then, he's off to the Clark County Fair in Nevada for Pretzel French Toast and the spicy Cheesy Carne Brick. Finally, Noah heads to the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for their Southern Fried Softshell Sandwich, the Fiery Fiesta Funnel Cake and Grape Gems, a candy-coated fruity treat!

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: A pair of sisters-in-law takes on a married flipping team to complete three next-level projects; a contemporary upgrade to a pair of armchairs and a golden-age improvement on a set of end tables.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Two college buddies prepare to throw down against a duo of fired-up best friends known as the Workshop Warriors to see who can create the most profitable flip; Geometric Design, Less Is More and Rehab Design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: A newlywed flipping team takes on a pair of artistic friends in a battle for flea market supremacy; Compact Design, East Meets West and Metal Works; a coffee table made by combining a washbasin with an iron gear.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Stylish ladies from Boston take on a team of competitive upcyclers in the ultimate flea market battle for a chance to win $5,000.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela travels to Spain and France to learn more about chamois, a goat-antelope species steeped in history. Local development, conservation, and brown bear research are funded by regulated hunting, which has helped revitalize the chamois population.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: A duo of dating designers face off against a creative couple in a furniture flip; starting at Elephant's Trunk Flea Market in Connecticut, and ending at New York's Long Island City Flea.

programme.desc: A pair of salvage-happy sisters face off against a couple of flipping buddies; the teams hit the flea market to find items to transform from the Flip List including an Industrial Elegance project, High Impact and Dual Design.
